mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(ri.time) AS time,
CASE WHEN ri.type = 'buy' THEN '采购单' WHEN ri.type = 'sell' THEN '销售单' WHEN ri.type = 'bre' THEN '采购退货单' WHEN ri.type = 'sre' THEN '销售退货单' WHEN ri.type = 'swap' THEN '调拨单' WHEN ri.type = 'swapEnter' THEN '调拨单-入' WHEN ri.type = 'swapOut' THEN '调拨单-出' WHEN ri.type = 'entry' THEN '其它入库单' WHEN ri.type = 'extry' THEN '其它出库单' ELSE ri.type END AS type,
CASE WHEN ri.type = 'entry' THEN (SELECT number FROM entry WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'extry' THEN (SELECT number FROM extry WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'buy' THEN (SELECT number FROM buy WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'sell' THEN (SELECT number FROM sell WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'bre' THEN (SELECT number FROM bre WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'sre' THEN (SELECT number FROM sre WHERE id = ri.class) WHEN ri.type = 'swap' OR ri.type = 'swapEnter' OR ri.type = 'swapOut' THEN (SELECT number FROM swap WHERE id = ri.class) END AS number,
CASE WHEN ri.direction = 0 THEN '减少' WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN '增加' ELSE CAST(ri.direction AS CHAR) END AS direction, CAST(ri.nums AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS nums FROM room_info ri INNER JOIN room r ON ri.pid = r.id WHERE r.goods = #{id}
AND r.warehouse IN
#{warehouseId}
ORDER BY ri.time DESC
